title: Condor (disambiguation)
content:
'''Condor''' can refer to:

*'''''[[Condor (MC40a light cruiser)|Condor]]''''': an [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40a light cruiser]].
*'''[[Condor (gunner)|Condor]]''': a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]] in [[Red Flight (K-wings)|Red Flight]].
*'''[[Drop Point: Condor]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[drop point]]
*'''[[Condor dragon/Legends|Condor dragon]]''': a flying, carnivorous [[Reptavian/Legends|reptavian]].
*'''[[Legion Condor EX]]''': a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] model.

{{Disambig}}
